extraction.one_line_summary: MOHORIČ Matej won the sprint finish and the overall GC after his Bahrain-Merida team controlled the climbs to neutralize a dangerous late attack from GREENS (Colombian, 19 years old) who came within 1.6km of stealing the race.
tactical_patterns: Bahrain-Merida positioned multiple teammates in top-10 GC to control tempo when MOHORIČ was dropped on climbs
Colombian rider attacked solo under 20km, gaining 45s and threatening GC before being caught at 1.6km remaining
MOHORIČ deliberately allowed attacks to unfold before relying on teammates to pace him back, conserving energy for sprint

rider_signals.MOHORIČ Matej: positive: Won 5 of 7 stages plus GC by using team tactically to survive climbs then sprint, showing both patience and team resource management
rider_signals.BONIFAZIO Niccolò: negative: Crashed on narrow roads during crucial GC selection phase, abandoning his own top-10 ambitions early
